tools.name: calendar_list_events
tools.description: List upcoming calendar events within a date range. Returns event summaries, times, and metadata.

time_min.description: Start of time range in ISO 8601 format (e.g. "2024-01-15T00:00:00Z"). Defaults to now.

time_max.description: End of time range in ISO 8601 format (e.g. "2024-01-22T00:00:00Z"). Defaults to 7 days from now.

max_results.description: Maximum number of events to return (default 25, max 250)

query.description: Free text search terms to filter events

single_events.description: Whether to expand recurring events into individual instances (default true)

order_by.description: Sort order (default "startTime"). Only valid when single_events is true.

reason.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Google account to use. Required when multiple Google accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.

tools.name: calendar_get_event
tools.description: Get the full details of a single calendar event by its ID.

reason.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Google account to use. Required when multiple Google accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.

tools.name: calendar_create_event
tools.description: Create a new calendar event. Include a confidence score (0-1) indicating how certain you are this action is correct.

start.description: Start time in ISO 8601 format (e.g. "2024-01-15T09:00:00-05:00") or date for all-day events ("2024-01-15")

end.description: End time in ISO 8601 format or date for all-day events

attendees.description: Email addresses of attendees to invite

timezone.description: IANA timezone (e.g. "America/New_York"). Required when start/end don't include timezone offset.

reason.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Google account to use. Required when multiple Google accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.

tools.name: calendar_check_availability
tools.description: Check free/busy status across one or more calendars to find available time slots.

time_min.description: Start of time range in ISO 8601 format

time_max.description: End of time range in ISO 8601 format

reason.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Google account to use. Required when multiple Google accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.

tools.name: calendar_rsvp
tools.description: Respond to a calendar event invitation (accept, decline, or tentative). Include a confidence score (0-1).

reason.description: Brief non-technical explanation of why this tool is being called

account.description: Email address of the Google account to use. Required when multiple Google accounts are connected. If omitted, uses the most recently connected account.
